series_metadata.series_description: Declaration of Material Assistance Forms served as a declaration by an applicant for public employment of material assistance/nonassistance to organizations on the U.S. Department of State Terrorist Exlusion List. They were required by ORC 2909.33. This section of code was repealed September 10, 2012. The law only required the forms to be retained for one year. The last forms have now passed that one year mark.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: Obsolete series and has passed on last required forms. upon receipt of this approved retention schedule. ; Electronic: Obsolete series and has passed on last required forms. upon receipt of this approved retention schedule
